aboutPage.title: About Us
paragraphs: Bitelex is focused on developing technical solutions tailored to the unique needs of its clients. Our goal is to build reliable and efficient technologies that help individuals and organizations create and manage their digital infrastructure.
Our teams are currently focused on web-oriented services, including the development of web applications and internet-based services.
aboutPage.aboutDinio: As the first product in our portfolio, we introduce DinioDNS, our modern DNS management platform currently under development.

dinioDnsPage.seoTitle: DinioDNS | One DNS platform. Total control.
dinioDnsPage.seoDescription: An all-in-one DNS platform combining authoritative hosting, intelligent traffic routing, privacy-focused DNS filtering, and a global edge network.

hero.title: One DNS platform. Total control.
hero.lead: An all-in-one DNS platform that combines:
points: Powered by a global edge network
hero.notice: Currently in development - sign up to receive updates and early access.

problem.title: The problem we solve
problem.subtitle: DNS today is fragmented
problem.lead: Modern infrastructure often requires multiple tools:
problem.conclusion: Managing them separately increases complexity, cost, and latency. Our DNS platform unifies everything.

authoritative.title: Authoritative DNS Hosting
authoritative.lead: Reliable, programmable DNS infrastructure for modern applications.

features.title: Geo routing
features.desc: Route traffic based on user location without complex anycast infrastructure.

features.title: Geo blocking
features.desc: Restrict access from specific regions directly at the DNS layer.

features.title: Health checks
features.desc: Automatically reroute traffic when a service becomes unavailable.

features.title: API-first management
features.desc: Automate DNS configuration and integrate it with your infrastructure.

features.title: Web redirects
features.desc: Redirect domains and subdomains without extra services.

privacy.title: DNS Shield
privacy.lead: Privacy-focused DNS resolution for devices and networks.

features.title: Blocklists
features.desc: Filter trackers, malware, and unwanted domains.

features.title: Black IP blocking
features.desc: Prevent communication with known malicious IP addresses.

features.title: Intelligent edge caching
features.desc: Frequently used records are refreshed and cached closer to the edge to reduce latency.

useCases.title: Use cases
useCases.subtitle: Built for different DNS use cases

edge.title: EDGE NETWORK
edge.subtitle: Built for the edge
edge.lead: Both DNS layers run on our global edge infrastructure.

expansion.title: Built to expand
expansion.lead: Our DNS platform is designed to evolve beyond traditional DNS capabilities.
expansion.note: Join the waitlist to stay updated.

why.title: Why we are building this
paragraphs: The demand for reliable DNS services continues to grow as internet infrastructure becomes increasingly complex.
At the same time, security and privacy challenges require new approaches. We believe part of the defense should start at the very core of internet communication - the DNS layer.
We also believe the future of infrastructure lies in distributed edge systems, enabling a faster and more resilient internet.
Our goal is not to replace existing solutions, but to contribute to a healthier and more resilient DNS ecosystem by reducing dependency on a small number of large providers.

closing.title: DNS is evolving. Be the first to try it.
closing.lead: Our platform is currently in development.
